chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.2978 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.15767/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on M.A. No.15768/2025 (Ex/A). 3. For hearing of bail application..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 30.10.2025 Mr. Waseem Nabi Panhwar, Advocate for Applicant a/w applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicant/accused Juman Chandio @ Dado Chandio son of Hajan seeks protective bail in FIR No.128/2023 under Section-354A, 337Ai, 337fi and 504 PPC, registered at P.S B-Section Dadu. Learned counsel for the applicant/accused inter alia contends the applicant/accused is innocent and has been falsely implicated with malafide intention; that the applicant intends to surrender before the trial Court for his bail but apprehends of his imminent arrest, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 10 days from today i.e 30.10.2025 to 08.11.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. The applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 10 days period i.e. 08.11.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case, the applicant fails to make his appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited.

This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 10 days period i.e. 08.11.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case, the applicant fails to make his appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
